parameters.jsCode:
const query = $json;
return [{ json: { organizationId: query.organizationId || null, batchId: query.batchId || null, sourceRecordId: query.sourceRecordId || null, state: query.state || null, page: query.page || 1, pageSize: query.pageSize || 25 } }];

parameters.query: SELECT state, COUNT(*)::int AS count, COALESCE(MAX(error_message), '') AS "latestErrorMessage" FROM ingestion_jobs WHERE organization_id = '{{$json.organizationId}}'::uuid GROUP BY state ORDER BY state LIMIT '{{$json.pageSize}}'::int;
